sentences.arabic: حَجَزَ سَمِيرٌ غُرْفَةً فِي الْفُنْدُقِ عَبْرَ الْهَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je rezervisao sobu u hotelu putem telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Samir reserved a room in the hotel by phone.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ وَقَدَّمَ جَوَازَ سَفَرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao je u hotel i predao pasoš.
sentences.translationEn: He arrived at the hotel and presented his passport.

sentences.translation: Službenik mu je dao ključ sobe i nasmiješio se.
sentences.translationEn: The employee gave him the room key and smiled.

sentences.translation: Soba je bila čista i udobna.
sentences.translationEn: The room was clean and comfortable.
